source: Closed SEC Form 8-K skeleton carrier pack drafted from retained public 8-K fixtures under datasets/real_world_transfer.
purpose: Constrain SEC Form 8-K compiles to recurring cover-page, item-heading, exhibit, and signature anatomy before attempting event-specific disclosure substance.

lenses.purpose: Filing wrapper, registrant, and cover-page identifiers.

Form 8-K item headings, structural roles, and any source-stated item legal-treatment statements. Emit the structural sec_filing_item/5 row and, separately, sec_filing_item_treatment/4 when the item body states treatment such as furnished, filed, or not deemed filed.

Exhibit table rows and exhibit-row legal roles. Keep item-body incorporation statements on sec_filing_item_treatment/4; do not let them override an exhibit row or item-body statement that says an exhibit is filed or furnished.

predicates.notes: Identifies one Form 8-K or Form 8-K/A current report. event_date is the cover-page Date of Report or Date of Earliest Event Reported when stated. filing_date is only an explicitly labeled filed/submitted/accession date; use not_stated when no separate filing date is stated. Use companion carriers for items, registrant identifiers, exhibits, and signature.
Links the filing to the source-stated registrant and jurisdiction. Does not carry address or identifier bundles.
Preserves one source-stated registrant identifier at a time, such as CIK, commission file number, EIN, ticker, exchange, or telephone; CIK is emitted only when explicitly stated in source.

Preserves one Form 8-K item heading as compact structural anatomy, not the body text. item_role is structural only. Source-stated filed/furnished/not-filed legal treatment belongs in sec_filing_item_treatment/4.
Preserves source-stated legal treatment for a Form 8-K item body. Emit separately from the structural item row and attach to the item whose body states the treatment.

Preserves one exhibit table row with compact number, kind, and exhibit-row legal-treatment role. Use filed or furnished when the source says the exhibit is filed or furnished; use not_stated when no exhibit-row legal treatment is stated. Item-body incorporation language belongs to the item-treatment carrier and must not override the filed exhibit role.
Preserves one signature-block signer, compact title, and typed signature date.
Records accountable omissions for expected SEC carrier families. It is not an answer substitute.
